member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.MergeDocuments.Definitions.Error
member.summary: Error that occurred during the task.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.MergeDocuments.Definitions.Input.DestinationFilePath
member.summary: Path where to save merged Pdf.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.MergeDocuments.Definitions.Options.ThrowErrorOnFailure
member.summary: Whether to throw an error on failure.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.MergeDocuments.Definitions.Options.ErrorMessageOnFailure
member.summary: Overrides the error message on failure.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.MergeDocuments.Definitions.Result.Success
member.summary: Indicates if the task completed successfully.

member.name: P:Frends.Pdf.MergeDocuments.Definitions.Result.Error
member.summary: Error that occurred during task execution.
member.example: object { string Message, object { Exception AdditionalInfo } }

member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.MergeDocuments.Pdf
member.summary: Converts an A3 PDF into an A4-scaled version using PdfSharpCore (XPdfForm). Uses only the first file in InputFilePaths as the source.

member.name: T:Frends.Pdf.MergeDocuments.Helpers.ErrorHandler
member.summary: Handles error with usage of a standard ThrowOnFailure Frends flag

member.name: M:Frends.Pdf.MergeDocuments.Helpers.ErrorHandler.Handle(System.Exception,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.param: Message to throw in error event
member.returns: Throw exception if a flag is true, else return Result with Error info
